zh.Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United K: 英國英格蘭爾奧維 奧福
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Mainwaring於1394年出生在英國英格蘭爾奧維 奧福時，他的父親Sir Ranulph Mainwaring31歲，母親Margery Venables25歲。他於大約1412年與Margaret Delves在英國英格蘭爾奧維 奧福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1482年9月在英國爾奧維 奧福享年88歲，埋葬在英國爾奧維 奧福。

zh-hans.Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United K: 英国英格兰爾奧維 奧福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Mainwaring于1394年出生在英国英格兰爾奧維 奧福时，他的父亲Sir Ranulph Mainwaring31岁，母亲Margery Venables25岁。他于大约1412年与Margaret Delves在英国英格兰爾奧維 奧福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1482年9月在英国爾奧維 奧福享年88岁，埋葬在英国爾奧維 奧福。

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Mainwaring was born in 1394, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Ranulph Mainwaring, was 31 and his mother, Margery Venables, was 25. He married Margaret Delves about 1412, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in September 1482, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, at the age of 88, and was buried in Over Peover, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Mainwaring est né en 1394, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Ranulph Mainwaring, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margery Venables, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Delves environ 1412, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en septembre 1482, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterré à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United K: Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Mainwaring 1394 in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ranulph Mainwaring 31 und seine Mutter Margery Venables 25. Er hat um 1412 in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Delves geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb im September 1482 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Over Peover, Cheshire, England und wurde in Over Peover, Cheshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret Delves circa 1412, nel Over Peover, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel settembre 1482, nel Over Peover, Cheshire, England, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolto a Over Peover, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Mainwaringが1394年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーで生まれた時，父Sir Ranulph Mainwaringは31歳，母Margery Venablesは25歳であった。約1412年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーでMargaret Delvesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1482年9月にイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーで88歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Mainwaring(이)가 1394년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버 p오버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ranulph Mainwaring(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Venables(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버 p오버에서 Margaret Delves(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1482년 9월 영국 체실르 버 p오버에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 버 p오버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Mainwaring nasceu em 1394, em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Ranulph Mainwaring, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margery Venables, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Delves aproximadamente 1412, em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1482, em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 88 anos, e foi sepultado em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Mainwaring родился в 1394 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Ranulph Mainwaring было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margery Venables, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Delves около 1412 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер сентябрь 1482 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия в возрасте 88 лет и был похоронен в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия.
